headline: Utility ETFs Soar 8% YTD on AI Power Demand. Here’s Which One to Buy
summary: AI data centers are rewriting the utility sector's playbook, and four ETFs are jockeying for position as the power grid strains to keep up. Picking the wrong one could mean trading income stability for concentrated bets on a theme that may already be priced in.
